meta.title: Kleptocracy and Democracy Debate Series: The Crisis of Big Money Media
meta.description: Martha Bayles and Megan McArdle debate whether it is time to rein in kleptocrats who try to dominate the world's media. Jeffrey Gedmin moderates.
